name: Robert Redford
abstract: Charles Robert Redford Jr. (August 18, 1936 – September 16, 2025) was an American actor, director, and producer, celebrated for his magnetic presence as a leading man during the American New Wave.

concerts.label: Benefit Concert for The Natural Resources Defense Council & The Way of the Rain
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Jang
about_quotes.evidence: I think I read it was incorporated, they had an interview with Robert Redford and it was a great interview where he described the incubator process
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Jang interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 17, 2003 [interview 1 of 2]
